nasb.text: The old man said, “Peace to you. Only let me take care of all your needs; however, do not spend the night in the open square.”

esv.text: And the old man said, “Peace be to you; I will care for all your wants. Only, do not spend the night in the square.”

cnv.text: 那老年人說：“願你平安，你所缺乏的，由我負責好了；只是不可在廣場上過夜。”

ccb.text: 那老人说：“到我家来吧，我会供应你们的需要，千万不可在街头露宿。”
